backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the game backend with high score tracking, player profiles, session stats, and XP-based leveling system. Includes authorization checks, score submission, leaderboard management (top 10), and a 55-level XP threshold table.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the ESC-key pause/resume feature to its implementing files (FirstPersonCamera.tsx and useWaveSystem.ts) with high confidence and test ID REQ-2.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing auto-generated one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing component responsibilities, hook APIs, and recent changes across the project.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'FPS Zombie Shooter' that mounts the app into a #root div and loads the TypeScript entry point via a module script tag.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing top-level screen routing (menu, game, gameover, leaderboard, controls, profile) and passing game result state between screens.
frontend/src/components/ControlsScreen.t: Static controls reference screen that renders a styled list of keyboard/mouse bindings (WASD, shoot, reload, pause, etc.) in a Borderlands toon style with a back button.
frontend/src/components/Game/BloodDecals: Imperative React Three Fiber component (via forwardRef) that renders up to 200 persistent blood pool and splatter decals as flat circle meshes on the ground plane.
frontend/src/components/Game/BloodPartic: React Three Fiber component that simulates short-lived blood particle bursts using an instanced mesh with gravity, bounce damping, and a completion callback when all particles expire.
frontend/src/components/Game/DesertEnvir: Renders the full desert game environment including procedurally generated buildings, palm trees, sand/sky shaders, Pack-a-Punch machine, Juggernog machine, and mountain barriers using toon shading and outline materials.
frontend/src/components/Game/EnemyMesh.t: Renders animated 3D zombie enemy meshes with toon shading, hit flash effects, limb dismemberment physics, and player-facing orientation logic.
frontend/src/components/Game/FirstPerson: Implements first-person player movement with WASD/sprint/jump controls, mouse-look, gravity, and AABB-based collision detection against buildings, mountains, and interactive objects.
frontend/src/components/Game/GameScene.t: The main game scene component that orchestrates the Canvas, all game systems (weapons, enemies, waves, Juggernog, audio), raycasting for shooting, blood effects, HUD, and game-over logic.
frontend/src/components/Game/HUD.tsx: Renders the in-game heads-up display including health bar, ammo counter, weapon selector, crosshair, score, wave info, kill streak, points notifications, and contextual interaction prompts.
frontend/src/components/Game/JuggernogMa: Renders an animated 3D Juggernog perk machine using toon materials, with pulsing red glow, flickering screen, and floating spark particles that deactivate after 2 purchases.
frontend/src/components/Game/MountainBar: Generates a procedural rocky mountain ring barrier using distorted cone, box, and icosahedron geometries with seeded RNG for deterministic variation and realistic stone color palettes.
frontend/src/components/Game/MuzzleFlash: Renders a brief animated muzzle flash sphere at a given position that fades out over 80ms when the active prop is true.
frontend/src/components/Game/PackAPunchM: Renders an animated Pack-a-Punch upgrade machine with tier-based color theming, pulsing glow, flickering screen, and floating particles using standard PBR materials.
frontend/src/components/Game/PalmTree.ts: Generates procedural palm trees with seeded-RNG tapered trunks, drooping fronds, and coconut clusters using custom BufferGeometry construction for per-tree variation.
frontend/src/components/Game/PauseOverla: Displays a styled full-screen pause menu overlay with a resume button and instructions, rendered over the game canvas.
Renders floating, rotating health or ammo pickup meshes that auto-collect when the player comes within 1.5 units, triggering the appropriate callback.
frontend/src/components/Game/ToonMateria: Provides reusable React hooks that create and cache custom toon-shading and back-face outline ShaderMaterials with support for hit-flash effects.
frontend/src/components/Game/WaveOverlay: Renders a centered overlay UI during wave transitions, showing countdown timers, boss warnings, and wave-cleared messages. Returns null during active gameplay, menu, or game-over phases.
frontend/src/components/Game/WeaponViewM: Renders 3D first-person weapon view models using React Three Fiber, with animated glow overlays and sparkle effects based on upgrade tier. Includes individual weapon geometry components (e.g., PistolModel) with recoil and reload animation support.
frontend/src/components/GameOver.tsx: Displays the game-over screen with final stats (score, wave, kills, headshots), submits session stats to the backend for authenticated users, and allows leaderboard score submission with a player name input.
frontend/src/components/Leaderboard.tsx: Fetches and displays the top player scores in a styled leaderboard table with rank medals, score, and wave columns. Shows loading, error, and empty states accordingly.
frontend/src/components/MainMenu.tsx: Renders the animated main menu with background parallax layers, dust motes, and navigation buttons for starting the game, viewing the leaderboard, controls, and profile. Handles Internet Identity login/logout via the useInternetIdentity hook.
frontend/src/components/PlayerProfile.ts: Displays the authenticated player's profile including level, XP progress bar, and lifetime stats (kills, headshots, shots fired, points). Fetches or creates the profile via useGetOrCreateProfile and computes level progression using a shared utility.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated identities, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useEnemySystem.ts: Manages enemy and pickup state for a wave-based game, including spawning, damage/hit detection, dismemberment zones, scoring, and points notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameAudio.ts: Provides memoized callbacks for playing synthesized game audio effects such as gunshots, zombie sounds, player hits, pickups, and wave events.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout state and identity to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useJuggernogSystem.ts: Manages the Juggernog perk system allowing up to two health upgrades, tracking purchase count, max health, and providing purchase/reset logic with point cost validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: Fetches the high score leaderboard from the backend actor and provides a mutation to submit new scores, with cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching/creating a player profile and updating it with session stats, gated on authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/useWaveSystem.ts: Controls wave progression state machine (menu, countdown, active, cleared, gameover) with countdown timers, enemy spawning callbacks, and pause support.
frontend/src/hooks/useWeaponSystem.ts: React hook managing weapon state including switching, firing, reloading, recoil, and upgrades for three weapon types, with keyboard shortcut support.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS defining a desert/Borderlands-themed design system with custom color tokens, Tailwind integration, and reusable toon-style component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/shaders/sandShader.ts: GLSL vertex and fragment shaders for a procedurally displaced sand terrain with dune-style noise and warm sandy color gradients.
frontend/src/shaders/skyShader.ts: GLSL shaders rendering a desert sky with a gradient from burnt-orange horizon to deep red-purple zenith and a sun glow effect.
frontend/src/shaders/toonShader.ts: GLSL shaders implementing Borderlands-style cel shading with 4-step posterized diffuse lighting, rim light, hit flash, and a solid dark outline pass.
frontend/src/types/enemy.ts: TypeScript interfaces defining Enemy (with health, movement, attack, dismemberment state) and Pickup types used throughout the game.
frontend/src/types/weapon.ts: TypeScript types and configuration constants for the three weapons (pistol, shotgun, assault rifle), including stats, upgrade costs, and damage multipliers.
frontend/src/utils/audioSynthesis.ts: Web Audio API utility that procedurally synthesizes gunshot sounds for each weapon type using noise buffers and oscillators, with lazy AudioContext initialization.
frontend/src/utils/levelSystem.ts: Utility mirroring backend XP threshold logic for a 55-level progression system, providing functions to calculate level, XP boundaries, and percentage progress.
frontend/src/utils/proceduralGeometry.ts: Generates deterministic procedural geometry data for a 3D arena, including buildings, ruins, barriers, rubble, and mountain ring segments using a seeded RNG. Also exports collision AABB generation for player-object collision detection.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing) and persisting them via sessionStorage. Includes helpers to store, retrieve, clear, and remove parameters from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (desert/game-themed colors, fonts, shadows, border radii) and keyframe animations (hit flash, damage flash, wave-in, accordion). Enables dark mode and includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state for an FPS Zombie Shooter game, documenting existing features (ESC pause menu), pending feature requests (direct gameplay start, ESC pause behavior), and architectural notes about menu-to-gameplay transitions.
